value.found_quote: For a prescriptive first local scan, start with the [Codex Security plugin quickstart](https://developers.openai.com/codex/security/plugin).
value.rationale: The page describes the Codex Security plugin, which runs in the Codex thread and supports a local scan. The plugin itself is presented as available, with quickstart and use cases; only the separate Codex Security cloud is noted as research preview. The local-scan plugin is described as active.
